phase_field.description: Phase field geometry and grid configuration.

oneOf.title: uncharged
oneOf.description: All elements treated as neutral — only sum-to-one constraint.

precursors.description: Formula strings for precursor phases. Restricts omega to their convex hull or reduces constrained_dim if all share a zero coordinate.

oneOf.title: charged
oneOf.description: Each element has a single fixed formal charge — adds a charge-neutrality equality constraint.

oneOf.title: charge_ranges
oneOf.description: Mixed-valence elements. Fixed charges are a scalar; variable charges are [min, max]. Grid is built uncharged then filtered post-hoc.

elements.description: Element symbol → charge. Scalar for fixed (e.g. "O": -2), two-element array for variable (e.g. "Fe": [2, 3]).

oneOf.title: custom
oneOf.description: Arbitrary additional linear equality constraints (e.g. spinel stoichiometry). Each extra constraint reduces constrained_dim by one.

species.description: Element list (no charge constraint) or charge dict (adds charge constraint on top of custom_con).

oneOf.description: Element symbols only — no automatic charge constraint.
Element → charge (scalar or [min, max]). Charge constraint is added automatically.

custom_con.description: One or more rows of the form c · x = 0. A 1-D array is a single extra constraint; a 2-D array supplies multiple. Length of each row must equal the number of elements.

samples.description: One or more measured samples to run inference on.

composition.description: Measured bulk composition as a formula string, e.g. "Fe2Mn4Ti4".

knowns.description: Known co-existing phases from XRD, e.g. ["Fe3O4", "MnO"].

mass_weights.description: Rietveld mass fractions, same order as knowns. Will be normalised to sum to 1.

predicted_error.description: Uncertainty in mass weights: 0 = precise, 1 = rough.

version.description: Inference algorithm. 'b' uses the Dirichlet simplex method (PICIP-B). 'gaussian' forces the Gaussian hemisphere method (original PICIP-A from the paper), regardless of the number of known phases.

n_l.description: Number of lines used in the simplex discretisation.

n_p.description: Number of projection rays per line.

n_suggestions.description: Number of suggested next compositions to return.

min_dist.description: Minimum distance between suggestions in constrained-basis units. Omit for default spacing.

plot.description: Options for the output HTML figure. p_mode and surface_opacity only apply to 3-D phase fields (Cube plotter).

p_mode.description: 3-D only. How the probability density is rendered: 'all' plots every grid point, 'nonzero' plots points with p>0, 'top' plots the top fraction, 'surface' renders a convex-hull mesh.

top.description: Fraction of probability mass shown by 'top' and 'surface' modes.

surface_opacity.description: 3-D only. Opacity of the convex-hull surface when p_mode='surface'.

show_comps_hover.description: Show composition strings in hover tooltips.

comp_precision.description: Decimal places for compositions in hover text.
